reviews.review_description:
V96 Bugs.SETTINGS NOT SAVING CREDITS DISAPPEARING

Latest updates have improved the quality of the game overall. So many functional and thoughtful efforts were made. A very enjoyable time. Suggestions, replace dirty windshields on some vehicles, some grand stands are facing away from track, remove music at starting line, lap selection is restrictive and needs to allow user to choose less than pre-programmed amount INCLUDING 1 for "sprint" mode. Traffic Lights don't need light cones projecting while the effect looks fantastic in street lights and other lighting. Add body roll and sway? Reapply the turbo sounds BOV, add supercharger whine? We need a clean OVAL and stunt layouts for the OVAL. Bring back server browser. Ghost playback asynchronous multiplayer against leaderboard?  Replays/Camera mode?  Mini map? MORE tunnels/underpass AUDIO IS GREAT in there! PLEASE AVOID or REMOVE FIGURE 8 & SWITCH BACK TRACK DESIGNS. DON'T HIDE THE NEW COLOR PALLET selection tool, IT IS VERY COOL!

developer_response.body: Many thanks for this detailed review!  I will incorporate some of these features in the next update.  Cheers!

reviews.review_description:
SUPER fun game. Favorite part is to race off brand NASCAR. Definitely recommend listening to “Kickstart My Heart” by Mötley Crüe while racing on the desert tracks.

The only issue is that I’m unable to continue past desert track 2 and I didn’t know why

Game is fun I love it the Love the tracks the cars the trucks is fun steering is good need dramatic weather rain night time driving thunderstorm need a 3D crowd it look flat more cars and trucks need more vehicles. And can you please please fix the steering wheel when you're staring in a car crash into you and you in a reckon into a wall or something you can't stare no more if there will go to bunkers and you live at the restart your race over again or if you overturn sometimes with your hands it make the steering wheel go for bunkers and you can't stare straight no more Even when the steering wheel looking straight and you put your hands on it and make your hands turn cricket please fix this fix that problem that's a bug in the game I love this game is fun I haven't opened up any of the snow levels yet or any other ones yeah I'm at the desert city go-kart and track trying to work on open up the other one it's fun and competitive I love it just need dramatic weather and if you do with the dirt level and it rains it's very muddy mud flickering off the tires and nighttime driving that'll be fun with the headlights on and I say some of the graphical like the trees need to be 3D they're flat but this a fun game keep up the good work I love it I can't get enough of this ask so much fun Best racing game on the quest all recommendments to my friend

The screenshots didn't look great plus only a 4.1 review score had me a bit skeptical but this game is so much fun with lots of tracks and cars you get good bang for your buck and the ai is pretty good could be improved on but they hold their own against you overall highly recommend you try

reviews.review_title: Really good for how cheap it is
reviews.review_description: I love this game, and the grind to the formula cars is the best, but the ai could use some work, especially on the indoor kart tracks (garage ones), along with the ai that detects if you cut a corner. Overall, amazing game, 9/10 just a few tweaks and it would be a 10 (ADD A HALO/ MORE MODERN FORMULA CARS!!)

Good things....

Graphics, pretty decent
Physics, bit unrealistic but fun 
Lighting and shadows look good. 
Cars and courses are decent too, although the city levels look a bit naff.

Bad things,

No audio adjustment, 
Steering wheel locks up frequently,
Multiplayer lobby is a broken mess,
Game black screens often and crashes the headset.
Game has been like this for a year, I thought someone would actually try and fix the bugs and complete the game, it doesn't need much work????

Sadly refunding unless someone decides to fix the game.

To the developers, this game is awesome well done, love the variety of cars, tracks and feel of the game. It's nearly a 5 star game.
I play on quest 3, my 2 friends play on quest 2, for reference.
If you want decent feedback this is it and I don't mean any disrespect I love this game.
1 give people volume control of sound in settings we can hardly hear each other talk.
2 some of the courses especially snow and offroad courses are hard to follow, make it more obvious with cones or lines.
3 more technical but when the host sets up a match half the time the vehicle isn't displayed on the podium for the other players, when this happens and you start the match the players just get a black screen and the game needs quiting and restarting. I've been on for an hour tonight and had to restart almost 10 times. Clearly some bug there.
4 half the time the left oculus button doesn't bring up the reset position option or anything at all.
Hope this helps, want this game to be 5 stars. Just been racing the fast gocarts on the city, OMG this is so much fun,what I've wanted from VR for a long time.
PS if you bring in additional maps to buy we will buy them.

purchased this game almost a yr ago and uninstalled but did not ask for refund. Reinstalled last week and its been improved, updated and cleaned up. was never a fan of joystick car control but thanks to GLs, now i love it and i suggest this game is best with joystick control......One of the BESt racers on the quest.....LoVe it.....pls keep improving cos now am hooked. it handles much betterthan some(Exocars) Expensive racing games on  quest. ifu love racing, getthis game and u will not be disappointed..
Best driving game ever love it it a must have game if you like racing cars but I can’t get desert 2.2 to open what can I do to get it open please help me out
This is a must buy. I wasn't keen on the first cart races, but once you open up the city tracks, just wow! Loads and loads of tracks, plays great, looks amazing, and more importantly it's just fun.

There are so many glitches including the steering wheel just not working, bad graphics and shifting malfunctions all the time. The starter cars are junk and multiplayer does not work. Do not recommend.
Updates? Been over a year so take that as you like. Hopefully we get something because this could be super cool

reviews.review_title: Best bang for buck racer on Meta
reviews.review_description:
You want a full featured racing game reminiscent of racers on the OG Xbox or 360? (In terms of feel and style)
Get this.
No regrets with this purchase. Any short comings can be excused by early access. (Not that there are many.)
Good variety of vehicles, huge number of races. Single player modes including a career and multiplayer.
Motion controls are spot on.

If you want a solid arcade racer that's cheap to boot, you cannot go wrong here! I'll be playing this one for a long while I reckon. I had fun the entire time I was playing, and that is what games are meant to be. FUN.

Best $17aud I've spent on the Quest 3 since getting it. I look forward to seeing where this title goes. It's definitely off to a great start.

From what i played its a good racing game. I like that it has GoKarts and hopefully it will have more tracks. I do wish there was a way to disable steering with the left controller stick as i feel like its lazy, the motion controls work better than stick imo. Also wish there was a way to toggle the grip for grabbing steering wheel so you dont have to hold down the grip button.

reviews.review_title: Should be and would be 5 🌟 but...
reviews.review_description: There are some epic crashes in this game witch is awesome by the way. Is there a way to watch your race after? Or at least replay the crash? Great racing game though 👍

reviews.review_title: Best VR Racing Game, 1 Minor Issue
reviews.review_description:
First of all, this game is pretty much what the title says. This game is very fun with a decent variety of cars and a large collection of tracks. I can see this game being huge further in development. I hope the player base increases and multiplayer becomes a key focus. I recommend this game to everyone, 10/10. 

The one small issue I've encounter with this game is a graphical issue with the Tor 11xx vehicles. No matter the track or type of Tor vehicle I choose, the textures on the outer layer of the car do not load in. They are simply pink placeholders for a file that isn't loading or some other issue I do not know of. This doesn't ruin the performance of the game but does ruin the immersion a bit and can be annoying at times. Otherwise I have no other complaints about this game other than I want to see more content in the future!
Wow the game is awesome hooked on the go carts so much fun. Well done to the developers for making this. so much fun.
This game is really fun but you should add a highway map with ai traffic it would make this game so much more fun

This is the best racing game ever, but i was wondering if you could add more to the karting aspect of it? like real tracks eg:whilton mill, rye house etc, and possibly some indoor rental tracks too? it would be α great addition and i would never get off the game if it was added! also can i add, the ai’s are pretty unrealistic and if you crash/slow down, they dont swerve/ go around you instead they go full throttle into you, it would be really helpful if this was fixed! thanks

I largely bought this for multiplayer, but it doesn't work. Both players can get in room and ready up, but there's no option to start race. We just sit there with both of us set as ready.
Please help.
Game would be great with decent race AI, but leading a race and being spun from a car that has plenty of space to the inside isn't exactly my idea of fun.

I personally think that you guys are on to something here, this could/will be one of the best VR Racing games out there as time passes. More customizing options would be cool, but I'm sure you guys are well aware of that, you don't really need my two cents on this game when you know exactly what needs to be improved. Please oh please fix the multi-player racing option as soon as possible though, people will love that part of it. Anyways, can't wait to see what your team has in store for the future of this title, take care.

10/10 Graphisme 
9/10 Gameplay
More tracks and cars, please.
I'm not sure if you've considered adding reverse tracks, but that could be a nice addition.

I'm using (meta quest 3) and eveytime I go in to a game I'm half under the car or some times  half under the road. I can't find anything to help me tix this ?? 

So far it's unplayable  ;(
Excellent Game 🏎 🏁🏁 Add me to race: Fer_777
I'm unable to control my cart and everything  dims around me as if I'm in a circular tunnel.  I would like a refund please.

The star race button does not work. I have had this issue for 4 months and have still not been able to play the game at all. The developers replied to my previous review saying that they had fixed the issue, 4 months later the issue persists and I can not play the game

reviews.review_title: This is the game we deserve!!!!!
reviews.review_description: I tried the demo long time ago ...and I was surprised about the quality of this Applab driving game. After reading all the reviews I decided to buy it....and  WOOOW!!!! AMAZING! the game is on early acces but it could become a masterpiece when completed. Graphic is at high standard.....gameplay is fluid and gives you the feeling of speed. Plenty of cars to buy with different races and scenarios....it.looks like the stand alone version of gran turismo. There is also multiplayer but we need more people to play together. Definitely this is the best driving simulation game on the store IMHO.!

I was looking for a decent racing game, had to choose between this and Grid legends, and this is GREAT! Feels good, fun and smooth, good graphics and physics. Are there boxes in later stages to refuel or fix the car? It'd be very cool. Please keep it updated! Good work!! :-)
Awesome game

reviews.review_title: Best vr race game do far
reviews.review_description: Started playing this game 5 days ago and I can’t get enough of it. I keep promoting it while playing other multiplayer games to recruit more racers. The games has bugs but still is the best one around.

I love this game, it has a great car selection especially with the new rally map update, the tracks are fun, but the AI are really bad. Recently I’ve been racing on the snow track 3 with the AI on pro level, but they just keep ramming into me. No matter what the AI never fails to send me off the track. The physics are a little wonky and unrealistic. They’re not arcade physics, but their far from super realistic. Some off road tracks like the ones in the new snow area have really sharp bumps that will send you flying through the air and off the track if your not careful. I’ve also noticed on the Xcarts, just getting an inch of airtime is enough to completely spin you out. It gains too much angle while your turning and just wipes you out fast. Counter steering barely seems to work. But for a game that’s barely in beta, it’s really great. Hopefully the issues that I mentioned will be fixed soon. I can’t wait for what’s to come in the final version of this game. And for the cost, it’s really worth it

Edit: have some more things to say about the 0.5 update
Just to start, the drift assist is a great addition. Not only is it fun to slide around corners on some Touge maps like snow track 3, it’s useful for when oversteer is about to end your whole run. Using it in races though doesn’t help much, all it does is help you prevent spinning out and loses a lot of speed. Also putting the toggle on the right joystick is not really a good idea, since the boost button is already there and you have a higher chance of accidentally switching off the assist. Also stick drift might turn it off for those who suffer from it. It would be better to put it to the A button, and hold it for a second or two to toggle it since the handbrake is there. The demo track was also a great addition, I’ve been wondering if we’d ever see it in the full game. More tracks similar to it would be great (like mountain pass style with a lot of curves) Not many bugs that I’ve come across which is great. There is one that allows you to walk around a track outside of your car, to do it you gotta click the quit button and quickly press the restart button, which will allow you to move around the track. On the topic of going outside of your car, it would be great to have a replay option to record clips after a race so we can create better content of the game. Take a look at the rockstar creator in GTA 5 online for reference, something similar to that would be great for creating content.


EDIT 2 5.2 UPDATE:

I downloaded the 5.2 update right now but the game keeps crashing right after the first loading screen, I restarted my quest but it still crashed. Hopefully gets fixed soon
SORRY FOR CONCERN
Just had to update my quest lol

Actual 5.2 review lol
After playing the game for a little, have some recommendations. First, still need to move the drift assist, and not on the handbrake button lol, I realized what I said last edit. You could move it to press the left stick, it would be harder to accidentally activate it if you use stick steering. Especially if you have stick drift, you will occasionally deactivate drift assist when boosting and spinning out if you get into a slide. Now, content wise, I’d love to see a story mode of the game, where you can buy cars and customize them both performance and cosmetics to keep the game fresh, since only racing gets a little boring at times. Would also be nice to race custom cars online, at least only the cosmetics so no one has an unfair advantage. Also, boost in multiplayer? Would be nice to have boost while playing online for some more challenge. If it could be toggled it would be perfect. Just some car suggestions as well, an FRS/GT86/BRZ would be cool to drive in game. Plus possibly a bumper change since the three cars have different bumpers. Also with the addition with drift assist, it would be great to have some more game modes centered around drifting, like tandems. Also, maybe an option to increase steering radius, I only have to move the steering wheel at most 90 degrees for a turn and it would be cool to require more for a turn. By toggle though, feel like this would be tedious for some people who prefer the current.  New gloves look wonderful. I was a little tired of the standard black glove. Maybe player customization would be a good idea, we could change our helmets, glove color, things of that sort. The new interiors are perfect, I’m loving the carbon fiber steering wheel and panels. If you put your head in the dashboard, you can see the original speedometer behind the regular. It would be cool to have this implemented into the game and be able to switch between a simple and complex speedometer. Also on the Impreza interior, you can see the blurry STI embroidery on the seats behind you. It would be best to blur those out completely in case of anything. I don’t feel much has changed with the physics, other than being able to retaliate against the ai lol. Great addition, those ai need to be humbled sometimes. Overall, great small update.

reviews.review_title: New update New update is not downloading
reviews.review_description:
Two updates in two days that is amazing 
Unfortunately the latest update will not download and install correctly many people that I know are having the same issue ￼￼this game is excellent but you need to fix a few issues latest update being the biggest one but if you could get the old pony to work in multiplayer that would be awesome huge fan of your work. Keep up the great job, but please get these issues fixed 
￼￼￼￼￼the update finally worked

I purchased DRIVEN , game asking download and installed again and again . Very disappointing. Any idea ?

I tried it this morning and its ok !!!

Love it !!!

At the moment I don't feel "real" physics. The car feels cardboard, having no weight, center of gravity and springs. This destroys the whole atmosphere and does not allow you to enjoy the race. I think you should adopt physics from the good old flatout 2. I think it was the ideal balance between realism and arcade. Yes. And add stick control, please.

In general, I enjoy this game, especially the tracks with SUVs. It seems to me that this is the direction you need to develop the game, plus add a good sound (the sound of stones knocking on the bottom, the sound of gear shifting, etc.), destructible objects and improve physics. Then it will be an excellent game, for which you can safely take a few tens of dollars.

Great racing game and variety of tracks and cars for the price. Just a question about the public rooms in multiplayer. Are they live yet? I cant seem to get any public rooms to join in any region and no-one joins any that I create. Thanks. Keep up the great work on this game.

reviews.review_title: Really hope that devs finish the game
reviews.review_description:
Still in beta but already one of the best racing games on the store. Really hope that the devs don't stop now (the game seems to be stuck in v0.3 for a while now). 

Totally worth the money.

developer_response.body:
Hi.  Thanks for your review.  I have been unable to work on the game for the last few weeks but will be back in the next few days.
Cheers

reviews.review_description:
I've been waiting for a decent racing game ever since I purchased the quest 2 years ago. I noticed that you can do a free trial for this, so I thought I would try it out and wow I'm really Impressed. I played 15 minutes and then purchased the full game because I want to play a lot more. 
Graphics are excellent and are a lot better than they look from the pictures. 
There's also loads of different cars and tracks to choose from, so I'm sure I'm going to be spending hours on this game trying them all out.  
I hope to see this game on the main store soon 🙂

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much!  I also hope to see this in the main store some time...  ;-)
Cheers!

reviews.review_title: Best vr racing game by a long mile
reviews.review_description: Top quality game with plenty of tracks to keep you going and well truly money we'll spent. Very challanging at times but if you put the effort in you end up on the world leader board

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much!  There's more to come, including multiplayer and more tracks/cars.
Cheers!

reviews.review_description: Feels really natural to drive...keep up the good work....can't wait to see what you can do with more power to play with new gen...XR3...

developer_response.body:
Thank you RX62.  The mechanics are all physics-based which I think helps a lot with making the driving feel more realistic.

Cheers!

reviews.review_description: For me, one of the Best driving Game in VR.

developer_response.body:
Thank you - I'm glad you're enjoying the game.
Cheers

reviews.review_description: What a silly low price for most likely the best racing game for the quest.Graphics first class ,the challenge s are just about right and not out of anyone’s reach. Very very addictive,but learning the mechanics of the game has priority..otherwise your just crash and crash…well done the Devs.

developer_response.body:
Thank you!  Just the one Dev - glad you like the game so much!  I'm tempted to raise the price after this review ;-)

https://discord.gg/E6mGxcCSrw

reviews.review_description: It is really good racing game. Only question, can you make discord channel for multiplayer and announce it in game ? It would be nice play multiplayer more often. And can we reassign keys ? It would be really nice to change some bindings to personal prefers

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your review.  The Discord server is now up and running

https://discord.gg/E6mGxcCSrw

I will add key reassignment on my to-do list - good idea.

Cheers!

reviews.review_description:
Hi
Have a few problems with the game.
Race stats no longer count, 34 races run/34 won.                                                  It is impossible to beat my own times despite the new boost option,
there remains a distance of 10 sec. and more.
Winning every race . (while opponents are far behind is not that exciting.)
I reinstalled the game without success. (losing all your achievements is no fun, lol)
Play the game from its launch in 2021 and I was very impressed.
What could be wrong?
Jack.

Do something about the MANY bugs
instead of al the new races.

Back to one star

It's a great game you can play in the bed while your wife is sleep I would love the option of smooth turning while walking around and it would be great if you can open the hood of the car or the doors just to look inside a little better can't wait to see what's coming with the next updates

reviews.review_title: Best Racing on Quest so far.
reviews.review_description: Racing games on Quest (especially Q1) are hard to come by, and a good one is even more rare. This is a good one. Worth twice the price if you're into racing games, but dont expect Gran Turismo's options and modes. Expect a racing game that is actually playable!

very mind-blown how much better looking and handling this is compared to Grid Legends... why can't big studios like EA pay devs who know their turf to get them to do the ports so we could benefit from awesome native implementation AND big licenses? there's this awful chasm in the VR community...

anyway, keep it up. It's clearly going great.

Initially, I was very delighted by the UI, and my entrance into the race was great and immersive. I noticed a few frame rate hiccups… would love to see some options to lower visual quality to prioritize steady frame rate. You’ll lose people new to VR who have a tough time with motion comfort if that frame rate drops too low with this much movement in your peripheral vision… but from the bit I played it was minimal compared to other racers on the quest.

The steering wheel literally kept jerking over to the left or right causing me to crash and lose so I didn’t want to play any more. I’m not sure what I could do differently but wouldn’t mind seeing an option to use either tilt based steering, or joystick.

Visually the game looked way better than any other racer as far as realism goes. Finally a non-cartoon racer. I hope the dev keeps going… the quest needs more stuff like this. Cool to even see little details like a rear view mirror… something blatantly missing from another racer that just came out  from a major AAA publisher. 

I’m willing to give this one another try in a few months and see how it’s coming along… it really looks promising.

reviews.review_title: OMG please take more of my Money!!!
reviews.review_description: This is amazing, I have been longing for a racing game on the quest. This game looks amazing on quest 3! Absolutely phenomenal. Only thing I would ask is if it's possible to grab steering wheels anywhere, instead of only 10 and 2. But holy crap what a game, thank you devs!

I  really like this game. I would really like for it to have an oval track. Maybe have a larger oval with a Gokart oval in the infield. Maybe even put a figure 8 track in it. Just my two cents. 

Over all I really enjoy this game. Good graphics good physics and fun tracks.

reviews.review_title: Best oculus racing game so far
reviews.review_description:
Driving physics are realistic but still arcadey in a fun way, AI are super chaotic in rookie difficulty, and each car is different to keep things interesting. And there are a bunch of fun courses. Just wish more people played the online mode :(
(also thank you devs for fixing the steering glitch in the new patch, makes the game way better already)

I beat Drive Club VR in it's entirety on the PSVR, so I know a quality VR racer when I play one. This game is fantastic. I'm dumbfounded as to why Meta has ZERO realistic racers on the official store? No one under 13 should use VR, BTW here's a bunch of cartoon racers... Enjoy!?!

Can you you add stick controls? Play the above mentioned Sony game for a fantastic reference. Either way, 5 stars!

Good Stuff. AI drives like Instruction Derby. Unlocked some Cars now...really wish more People would buy this so i could find some Online Opponents to race with.
Going on now i want to unlock this Clio Sport like car (yes cars look familiar) :-)
Good racing game, very challinging,  goed price

developer_response.body:
Thank you for playing the game and your review.

Cheers

reviews.review_description: I really like the game it’s amazing the ai though is anoyying they bash into you and ran into walls cause a huge pile up please fix the ai

This game has potential to be a fun to play racing game. But at the moment is so full of bugs, that it is practically impossible to play. Falling throug the ground to Infiniti, broken steering, unintuitive menu. According to other reviews, the steering issue is present for quite some time without a fix. Too sad. Canceling the order.
Great racing game, very fun! However I’m struggling with to get multiplayer working with my friend?

“What the heck”?  I have played this now three times and each time as I driving along or racing the steering wheel pulls left. I don’t know why? What makes it worse is trying to grab the steering wheel again which is impossible. Each grab turns the steering wheel upside down. ??? Come Meta you guys are more intelligent than this. How about fix this issue. I’m about to return it for a refund.
Best racer on quest just need multiplayer to work then the game would be perfect
I can not even start a race, as "Race" and "Practice" are always greyed out and I can not start a race. I can do the two little 'RANDOMIZE" tracks, but that's it? Help Please.
